rows.label: qev060402_MSG0001
rows.name:
Aaaahhh... The Voltant courses through my
body, and everything becomes clear...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060402_MSG0002
rows.name:
Whiter... drawing closer to that
apex... again... Ahh! Aaaaaahhh...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060402_SEL0021
rows.name: Watch Arsenican's state for a while.

rows.label: qev060402_MSG0009
rows.name:
...You are... Ahh! Please...
do not interfere![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060402_MSG0015
rows.name:
Ahh... just a little more...
Just... a little more...[ST:wait ]
